ab: Shiga, Mnusa nami qmita swayi snaw Tama mu ka dha nami Tama mu.
ch: 昨天我和爸爸去拜訪我的叔叔。
en: Yesterday, my father and I visited my uncle.

ab: Gaga mangal luqih ka qaqay swayi snaw Tama mu.
Rmngaw yami ka hiya, gaga mbling ka babaw dnamux.
ch: 他告訴我們，房子的屋頂破了一個洞。
en: He told us that there was a hole in the roof of his house.

ab: Smalu dnamux siida ka hiya o, dburuq knnadax dnamux da.
ch: 他在修理屋頂時，從屋頂摔下來了。
en: He fell off the roof while repairing it.

ab: Madas wawa dapa ni pinglang ka Tama mu, bqana na swayi na snaw.
ch: 爸爸帶了牛肉和檳榔給叔叔。
en: My father brought beef and betel nuts for my uncle.

ab: Pprngaw nami tqiyan ka dha nami swayi snaw Tama mu, egubi ka snluan kari niya.
ch: 我和叔叔在房間裡聊天，他分享了很多故事。
en: My uncle and I chatted in the room, and he shared many stories.

ab: Mmusa ku siida, rngagan ku na masu wada mdakil bi hnigan ni mseejiq bi ka swayi snaw Tama mu.
ch: 我要離開前，叔叔誇我長高了，也變得更帥氣了。
en: Before I left, my uncle praised me for growing taller and becoming more handsome.

ab: Smiyuk ku rnngaw, “tay malu ka qaqay su da o, iyax bi mseupu tuhuy sapah.”
ch: 我說：「等叔叔腳好了，下次也來我們家玩。」
en: I said, "When your foot gets better, come to our house next time and visit us."
